project_context.description: Showcase website for the August 15th festival in Bramans, a traditional Alpine mountain village in Savoie, France. Features presentation, program, photo gallery, and volunteer form.
project_context.vibe: Festive, colorful, traditional, warm, Catholic heritage, alpine mountain conviviality.

layout_spacing.general: Generous padding (p-12 to p-24) to create a relaxed, premium traditional feel.
layout_spacing.grid: Use Mode A 'Tetris' grid for the gallery. Asymmetrical bento grid with col-span-4 and col-span-8 variations. Add gap-8.

components.forms: Use Shadcn customized for a warmer look. Remove sharp technical borders, use rounded-xl and earthy border colors.
components.buttons: rounded-full bg-[#A4302F] text-white hover:bg-[#8B2625] transition-transform hover:-translate-y-0.5
components.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react for warm, elegant duotone or light line icons.

presentation.description: Presentation section: Rustic village festival outdoor

program_food.description: Program section (Repas): Traditional food and wine outdoor

critical_rules: The entire website must be strictly in French.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive and key informational elements.
Ensure contrast ratios are accessible, particularly over images.
Include google fonts 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Figtree' in index.html.
